Team

People behind SAIL.

A compact directory of the lab professor, students, research assistants, alumni, and collaborators.

Professors

The Professors section intentionally includes only Prof. Kok-Seng Wong.

Kok-Seng Wong

Associate Professor, Computer Science program

College of Engineering and Computer Science, VinUniversity

Prof. Kok-Seng Wong works on information security, data privacy, trustworthy AI, and federated learning, with a focus on privacy protection, robustness, backdoor attacks and defenses, and communication efficiency.

Information SecurityData Privacy ProtectionTrustworthy AIBackdoor Attacks and DefensesFederated Learning
HomepageScholarEmail

Security and Artificial Intelligence Lab

College of Engineering and Computer Science, VinUniversity
